---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for LinVault
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap. E.g. "I always lose track of links I meant to read later."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Which part of the app would this affect?**
- [ ] Web app
- [ ] Chrome Extension
- [ ] Discord bot
- [ ] Backend / API / database schema

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Mockups, examples from other apps, or anything else useful.
